title: idothea elata
intro: Idothea elata, also known as the mountain club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the world, particularly in Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Idothea elata has been used to treat various health conditions, such as respiratory issues and skin infections, and its herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
